title: Exemplary Novels
author: Miguel de Cervantes
description: "The Lady Cornelia" is a captivating tale from "The Exemplary Novels of Cervantes," which explores themes of honor, deception, and the complexities of human relationships. The story unfolds in Bologna, where two Spanish gentlemen, Don Juan de Gamboa and Don Antonio de Isunza, find themselves entangled in a series of unexpected events. The narrative begins with Don Juan inadvertently receiving a newborn child, wrapped in luxurious garments, from a mysterious woman in the dead of night. Concurrent...
